cards.front: What is Inter Process Communication (IPC) in Multi-threaded Programming?
cards.back: A method of communication between multiple threads or processes in a computer system

cards.front: What is a shared memory in Multi-threaded Programming?
cards.back: A region of memory that is shared by multiple threads or processes

cards.front: What is a semaphore in Multi-threaded Programming?
cards.back: A variable that controls the access of shared resources by multiple threads

cards.front: What is a synchronized block in Multi-threaded Programming?
cards.back: A block of code that is executed by only one thread at a time to ensure data consistency

cards.front: What is a mutex in Multi-threaded Programming?
cards.back: A short for 'mutual exclusion', a synchronization primitive that allows only one thread to access a shared resource at a time
